scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: cross-env API_PORT=5000 NODE_ENV=development pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev
scripts.dev:web: cross-env PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ NODE_ENV=development pnpm --filter @workspace/school-os run dev
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && cross-env PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && cross-env PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/school-os run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm run start:api" "pnpm run start:web"
scripts.start:api: cross-env API_PORT=5000 NODE_ENV=production pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run start
scripts.start:web: cross-env PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ NODE_ENV=production pnpm --filter @workspace/school-os run serve
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
